Column.name: dob
Column.comment: Date of Birth of the student.
Column.commentInRDBMS: Date of Birth of the student.
Column.notes: Date of Birth of the student.

Column.name: registration_no
Column.comment: Registration ID given by the Education Broad
Column.commentInRDBMS: Registration ID given by the Education Broad
Column.notes: Registration ID given by the Education Broad

Column.name: previous_school
Column.comment: Name of the Previous School Attended
Column.commentInRDBMS: Name of the Previous School Attended
Column.notes: Name of the Previous School Attended

Column.name: reason_for_leaving
Column.comment: Reason for Leaving the Previous School
Column.commentInRDBMS: Reason for Leaving the Previous School
Column.notes: Reason for Leaving the Previous School

Column.name: last_schooling_day
Column.comment: Last Schooling day of the student
Column.commentInRDBMS: Last Schooling day of the student
Column.notes: Last Schooling day of the student

Column.name: notes
Column.comment: Any Notes/Remark on Promotion and other Related?
Column.commentInRDBMS: Any Notes/Remark on Promotion and other Related?
Column.notes: Any Notes/Remark on Promotion and other Related?

Column.name: changed_on
Column.comment: Last record changed - date and time
Column.commentInRDBMS: Last record changed - date and time
Column.notes: Last record changed - date and time
